office_hours.custom_prompt: Run YC Office Hours product interrogation with 6 forcing questions.

ceo_review.custom_prompt: Run CEO Strategic Review: Challenge premises, mode evaluation (Expansion/Triage).

eng_review.custom_prompt: Run Eng Manager Review: Lock architecture, state machines, failure modes, ASCII data flow.

design_review.custom_prompt: Run Senior Designer Review: Rate UI 0-10, AI Slop detection, polish recommendations.

cso_audit.custom_prompt: Run CSO Security Audit: OWASP Top 10 + STRIDE threat modeling & secret redaction.

investigate.custom_prompt: Run Iron Law Root-Cause Debugging: Trace data flows, hypotheses, no blind fixes.

qa_lead.custom_prompt: Run QA Verification: Test execution, regression checks, bug reporting.

ship_release.custom_prompt: Run Release Engineer: Pre-flight checks, test verification, PR doc generation.

retro.custom_prompt: Run Weekly Retrospective: Shipping velocity, test health, growth learnings.

spec_author.custom_prompt: Author Technical Specification (/spec) with Codex quality gate and scope boundaries.

devex_lead.custom_prompt: Audit Developer Experience & Time-To-Hello-World (TTHW) friction points.

diataxis_writer.custom_prompt: Author Diataxis documentation (Tutorial, How-To, Reference, Explanation).

canary_sre.custom_prompt: Run Canary & Performance Benchmark: Core Web Vitals, API latency, console errors.

autoplan.custom_prompt: Run AutoPlan Pipeline: CEO → Design → Eng Architecture review chain.

silent_failure_hunter.custom_prompt: Audit codebase for silent failures, swallowed exceptions, empty catch blocks, bad fallbacks, and missing error propagation.

build_error_resolver.custom_prompt: Diagnose build errors, syntax failures, type mismatches, and dependency issues with specific fixes.

performance_optimizer.custom_prompt: Optimize code latency, memory usage, unoptimized loops, and token budget consumption.

harness_optimizer.custom_prompt: Audit agent harness prompts, tool delegation efficiency, and graph state transitions.

a11y_architect.custom_prompt: Audit UI accessibility (WCAG 2.1), color contrast, ARIA roles, and screen reader compatibility.

e2e_runner.custom_prompt: Run end-to-end integration tests, regression checks, and user flow validations.

seo_specialist.custom_prompt: Optimize pages for SEO, title/meta descriptions, semantic HTML structure, and OpenGraph headers.

doc_updater.custom_prompt: Keep documentation, READMEs, API specifications, and architecture maps updated.
